# Blue Staff

> [!info] 💧 Attachment · Cost: **1** · Spirit

*Artifact. Item. Staff.*

---

Attach to Alatar or Pallando. Restricted. Limit 1 per character.
**Action**: Exhaust Blue Staff to (choose 1): search the top 10 cards of your deck for a side quest or **_Spell_** card and add it to your hand (shuffle your deck), reduce each player’s threat increase for questing unsuccessfully this round by 3, or add 1 resource to attached hero’s pool.

**Pack:** [[ALeP - Strange News in Bree]] #7
